metadata.description: CipherHealth trial MCP plugins — Salesforce, ZoomInfo, Seismic, and Google Marketplace.

plugins.name: cipherhealth-salesforce
plugins.description: Salesforce hosted MCP (read-only) and query skills for CipherHealth CRM.

plugins.name: cipherhealth-zoominfo
plugins.description: ZoomInfo MCP for company and contact research and list building.

plugins.name: cipherhealth-seismic
plugins.description: Seismic MCP for CipherHealth sales content and enablement assets.

plugins.name: cipherhealth-google-marketplace
plugins.description: Google Workspace MCP tools via the CipherHealth Google Marketplace proxy.
